# Paketti — cross-orifice coverage (what's left on the table)

*Auto-generated by `.spine/build.py`. The three doors to a feature — keyboard / MIDI / menu — matched by action name. A feature behind one door is unreachable through the others.*

## 11,837 distinct actions

| reachable by | count | meaning |
|---|--:|---|
| **KME** | 386 | all three |
| **KE** | 913 | keyboard + menu (no MIDI) |
| **KM** | 3,645 | keyboard + MIDI (no menu) |
| **ME** | 145 | MIDI + menu (no keyboard) |
| **K** | 2,675 | keyboard ONLY |
| **E** | 1,688 | menu ONLY (mouse-only) |
| **M** | 2,385 | MIDI ONLY |

- Keyboard 7,619 · MIDI 6,561 · Menu 3,132
- **Shortcut but NO MIDI:** 3,588 (controller users can't reach)
- **Shortcut but NO menu:** 6,320 (undiscoverable by browsing)
- **Menu but NO shortcut:** 1,833 (mouse-only)
